text: I was just sitting here thinking of you, and it made me smile.
author: Unknown

text: Some people don't know how important they are. You are one of them.
author: Unknown

text: You crossed my mind today, and I couldn't help but smile.
author: Unknown

text: No matter how far apart we are, you are always on my mind.
author: Unknown

text: I think about you more than I probably should, and I've made peace with that.
author: Unknown

text: Thinking of you is my favorite thing to do when I have a spare moment.
author: Unknown

text: Every song, every quiet street, every cup of coffee — somehow it all points back to you.
author: Unknown

text: You've been on my mind all day, like a song I can't stop humming.
author: Unknown

text: Distance means so little when someone means so much.
author: Unknown

text: I don't have to see you to know you're the best part of my day.
author: Unknown

text: There isn't a moment in the day I don't think of you.
author: Unknown

text: Wherever I go and whatever I do, my thoughts always find their way back to you.
author: Unknown

text: Just a little note to say you were on my mind today.
author: Unknown

text: You are the first thing I think of in the morning and the last at night.
author: Unknown

text: If thoughts could travel, mine would be at your door right now.
author: Unknown

text: I carry your heart with me — I carry it in my heart.
author: E. E. Cummings

text: The best thing to hold onto in life is each other.
author: Audrey Hepburn

text: I think of you and everything else fades away.
author: Unknown

text: Thinking of you keeps me awake. Dreaming of you keeps me asleep. Being with you keeps me alive.
author: Unknown

text: Even on the busiest days, my mind saves a little room just for you.
author: Unknown

text: You are always in my thoughts, tucked somewhere between every worry and every hope.
author: Unknown

text: I hope you feel this: somewhere, right now, someone is thinking about you fondly.
author: Unknown

text: A day without thinking of you has never happened, and I hope it never does.
author: Unknown

text: Missing your presence, treasuring your memory, thinking of you today.
author: Unknown

text: You are the thought that makes an ordinary day feel like something.
author: Unknown

text: My mind wandered off today and, as always, it found you.
author: Unknown

text: I keep you in my thoughts the way you keep a photograph in your wallet — close, and often.
author: Unknown

text: Whenever life gets loud, thinking of you is the quiet I return to.
author: Unknown

text: You are proof that a person can live in your thoughts and warm your whole day.
author: Unknown

text: I thought of you and hoped this reached you at the exact moment you needed it.
author: Unknown

text: There's a corner of my mind that's just for you, and the light is always on.
author: Unknown

text: It's the small things — your laugh, your voice — that keep you on my mind.
author: Unknown

text: I don't know what tomorrow holds, but I know I'll be thinking of you through it.
author: Unknown

text: You are my favorite thought, the one I keep coming back to.
author: Unknown

text: Some days I love you quietly, from a distance, just by thinking of you.
author: Unknown

text: The moment I stop doing something, my mind hands me a thought of you.
author: Unknown

text: I hope you're having a good day. If not, know that someone across the miles is thinking of you.
author: Unknown

text: You've been living in my head rent-free, and honestly, you can stay.
author: Unknown

text: Thinking of you isn't a task I set out to do; it's just where my mind goes to rest.
author: Unknown

text: I saw something today that reminded me of you, and my whole day got softer.
author: Unknown

text: Between everything I had to do today, I found time to think of you — I always do.
author: Unknown

text: You're the reason I smile at my phone for no reason at all.
author: Unknown

text: Thinking of you, and of how lucky I am to call a man like you mine.
author: Unknown

text: There's no distance long enough to keep a good man like you off my mind.
author: Unknown

text: You make being apart bearable just by being the man you are — thinking of you today.
author: Unknown

text: Thinking of you and the way you love me like it's the easiest thing in the world — my girl.
author: Unknown

text: A woman like you doesn't leave a person's thoughts; she settles into them.
author: Unknown

text: Miles apart and you're still the first thing I think of — that's what you do to me.
author: Unknown
